meta.name: ShowGroundsLive Design System
meta.description: Earthy, organic, professional design for horse farm management. Modern clarity with natural tones. Use this file to instruct AI and developers to replicate the look and feel consistently.
meta.styleSummary: Modern Organic Professional — clean lines, ample whitespace, serif + sans-serif typography, forest greens and warm accent browns.

layout.primary: Fluid two-column grid for main content; single column on small screens.
layout.container: Fixed-width centered container with generous outer margins. Content framed, not edge-to-edge.
layout.sections: Clear visual separation into distinct blocks or cards. No dense walls of text.

hierarchy.principle: Use font size, weight, and color contrast to guide the eye: primary title → section headings → body → labels.
hierarchy.zones: Header (breadcrumb + title + subtitle), main content (cards in columns), optional footer (full-width cards).

alignment.columns: Vertical alignment consistent among cards in the same column.

spacing.unitDescription: Prefer multiples of 8px (e.g. 8, 16, 24, 32, 40, 48) for margins and padding.
spacing.outerMargins: Generous whitespace around the main content area; avoid cramped edges.

betweenCards.vertical: Generous (e.g. 24–32px) so cards read as distinct blocks.
betweenCards.horizontal: Consistent but slightly less than vertical when cards sit side-by-side.

spacing.insideCards: Uniform padding (e.g. 20–24px) so text and icons have breathing room.
spacing.iconToText: Small, consistent gap between icon and label/description.
spacing.lineHeight: Body text: comfortable line height (e.g. 1.5–1.6) for readability.

families.heading: Serif — strong, slightly decorative (e.g. Georgia, Lora, Playfair Display). Use for main page/section titles.
families.body: Sans-serif — clean, neutral, highly legible (e.g. Inter, Open Sans, Lato). Use for UI, body, labels, list items.

fonts.philosophy: Timeless elegance (serif heading) + modern clarity (sans-serif body). Professional and approachable.

weights.bold: Primary titles, card titles, list item titles.

sizes.body: Medium — feature descriptions, data labels, paragraphs.
sizes.small: Subtitle, contextual text, breadcrumb-style labels (e.g. '01 / Project Foundation').

fonts.casing: Natural casing preferred; minimal use of uppercase.

background.description: Very light off-white / warm beige canvas.

surface.description: White or crisp off-white for content cards.

accent.description: Deep olive / forest green for primary brand, key sections, icon circles.

text.description: Dark grey / forest tones on light; white on dark green.

accentWarm.description: Muted orange-brown for labels, checkmarks, vision icon, contextual cues.

semantic.description: Soft warm brown/gold for info or warning cards.

borders.card: Very light grey or desaturated light green (e.g. #E8E8E8 or #E0E6E0).
borders.cardAccent: Thin left border on some cards (same tone).

usage.heading: Primary title: muted green (greenDark). Section titles on light: dark grey/black. Section titles on green: white.
usage.icons: On circles: green fill, white icon. Accent icons (checkmark, vision): orange-brown circle, white icon. Standalone on light card: orange-brown.

traits: Clean and minimalist — focus on essential information.
Soft modernism — rounded corners on cards and icon containers.
Consistent iconography — solid-fill, simple, recognizable; often in circles.
Subtle depth — very light shadow on cards if needed; layered but not heavy.
Earthy palette — greens and warm neutrals; trustworthy and grounded.
Approachable — rounded corners and natural tones reduce rigidity.

designPrinciples: Clarity — information straightforward and easy to digest; each section has a clear purpose.
Hierarchy — size, weight, and color guide users from most to least important.
Consistency — same card style, spacing, typography, and color usage across similar components.
Readability — comfortable fonts, line height, and contrast.
Balance — layout equilibrium (e.g. heavier green section balancing lighter cards).
Trustworthiness — clean, organized, professional to inspire confidence.
Accessibility — aim for WCAG 2.1 AA contrast where applicable.

header.breadcrumb: Small sans-serif, medium weight, muted orange-brown (accentWarm). Example: '01 / Project Foundation', '04 / Functional Requirements'.
header.title: Large serif (H1), deep muted green. Strong visual impact.
header.subtitle: Sans-serif, regular, below title; secondary text color; optional.

informationCard.structure: Rectangular card, rounded corners, white background.
informationCard.border: Optional: subtle thin left border (or left accent), light grey or light green-grey.
informationCard.icon: Circle with dark muted green fill; icon inside white. Simple, line-based or solid.
informationCard.title: Sans-serif, bold, dark grey/black.
informationCard.body: Sans-serif, regular, dark grey; generous line height.

keyBenefitsBlock.structure: Large block, noticeably rounded corners (especially top). Dark olive/forest green background.
keyBenefitsBlock.title: Sans-serif, bold, white.
keyBenefitsBlock.listItem: Single line per benefit; leading icon + text.
keyBenefitsBlock.listIcon: Small circle, muted orange-brown fill, white checkmark inside.

visionCard.structure: Smaller card, rounded corners, white background; no left border accent.
visionCard.icon: Small icon (e.g. lightbulb) in muted orange-brown, above/left of title.
visionCard.title: Sans-serif, bold, dark grey/black.

coreCapabilitiesCard.structure: Tall card, list of items with icon + title + description.
coreCapabilitiesCard.title: Card title: sans-serif, bold.
coreCapabilitiesCard.itemIcon: Circle, muted green fill, white icon.

dataExtractedCard.structure: Card listing data items with icons.
dataExtractedCard.itemIcon: Circle, warm brown/gold fill (#CBB490 range), white icon.

warningInfoCard.structure: Distinct card for technical complexity or warnings.
warningInfoCard.text: Standard body color; clear, concise message.

footerCard.structure: Full-width or side-by-side cards at bottom (e.g. Database Storage, Implementation Team).
footerCard.text: White; bold for titles, regular for body.

implementationNotes.tailwind: Map this design system to Tailwind: extend theme with these colors, font families, spacing, and border-radius. Use semantic class names.
implementationNotes.tokens: Do not hardcode hex values in components; use design tokens or Tailwind theme derived from this file.
implementationNotes.components: Build reusable components (Header, InformationCard, KeyBenefitsBlock, VisionCard, etc.) that consume these tokens and follow these specs.
implementationNotes.ai: When generating or modifying UI, always respect structure, spacing, fonts, colors, and component specs above to replicate the ShowGroundsLive look.
